components.title: Close custody gaps
components.description: Resolve long wallet-migration and consolidation histories as atomic custody components. One-to-many, many-to-one, N:M, on-chain, Liquid, and Lightning legs can share one reviewed interpretation without rewriting the imported transactions.
components.bulkDescription: Paste one component or a batch as JSON, preview conservation locally, then save every item as a draft or activate the complete batch.
components.atomicHint: Bulk activation is all-or-nothing. If any component is incomplete or does not conserve, nothing is activated. Save drafts while a wallet, fee, or intermediate hop is still missing.
components.referenceHint: Use transaction, transaction_ref, or transaction_id for imported anchors. For a missing historical wallet, set untracked_wallet to a new or existing placeholder label plus occurred_at; the batch creates and reuses it atomically. N:M flows need explicit source_ordinal/sink_ordinal allocations. Write amount_btc as a JSON decimal string, or use decimal strings for integer fields beyond JavaScript's exact range.
components.previewReadyHint: The batch is structurally valid and locally conserves. The daemon will still verify wallet ownership, transaction direction, asset, allocation coverage, and active-component conflicts before committing.
components.listDescription: Versioned interpretations currently recorded for this book. An authored active component remains a draft for accounting if its complete evidence set no longer validates.
components.moreAvailable_one: Showing the newest {{count}} component. More exist in this book; narrow the review scope to inspect older revisions.
components.moreAvailable_other: Showing the newest {{count}} components. More exist in this book; narrow the review scope to inspect older revisions.
components.empty: No custody components yet. Preview a migration batch above to start.
components.serverPreviewActivates_one: The daemon accepted this exact batch for atomic activation: {{count}} component, {{active}} active.
components.serverPreviewActivates_other: The daemon accepted this exact batch for atomic activation: {{count}} components, {{active}} active.
components.serverPreviewDrafts_one: The daemon accepted this exact batch as drafts: {{count}} component, {{draft}} draft.
components.serverPreviewDrafts_other: The daemon accepted this exact batch as drafts: {{count}} components, {{draft}} draft.
components.revisionSingleRequired: A revision document must contain exactly one component.

revisionDialog.description: Edits create a new immutable revision. The previous record stays in the audit trail; activating the revision atomically replaces the active interpretation.
revisionDialog.safetyHint: Persisted leg IDs keep hidden local evidence attached while the daemon writes fresh immutable IDs. You may correct legs, allocations, conservation, conversion review, policy, and notes.

localIssue.documentRequired: Provide a non-empty component array or an object with a non-empty components array.
localIssue.componentObjectRequired: Component {{component}} must be a JSON object.
localIssue.legsRequired: Component {{component}} needs at least two legs.
localIssue.legObjectRequired: Component {{component}}, leg {{leg}} must be a JSON object.
localIssue.roleUnsupported: Component {{component}}, leg {{leg}} has an unsupported role.
localIssue.amountInvalid: Component {{component}}, leg {{leg}} must contain exactly one non-negative exact amount_msat integer (number or decimal string) or amount_btc decimal.
localIssue.transactionlessWalletRequired: Component {{component}}, leg {{leg}} has no transaction anchor and needs a wallet reference.
localIssue.transactionlessTimeRequired: Component {{component}}, leg {{leg}} has no transaction anchor and needs occurred_at.
localIssue.valuationPairRequired: Component {{component}}, leg {{leg}} must provide valuation_unit and valuation_amount together.
localIssue.valuationAmountInvalid: Component {{component}}, leg {{leg}} needs a non-negative exact-integer valuation_amount (number or decimal string).
localIssue.valuationTokenInvalid: Component {{component}}, leg {{leg}} has an invalid valuation_unit token.
localIssue.conversionPolicyInvalid: Component {{component}} has an invalid conversion_policy; use a lowercase stable token.
localIssue.conversionReviewedInvalid: Component {{component}} must set conversion_reviewed to true or false.
localIssue.conversionValuationRequired: Component {{component}} needs an exact valuation for every material conversion leg.
localIssue.sourceRequired: Component {{component}} needs a positive source leg.
localIssue.ownedDestinationRequired: Component {{component}} needs a positive destination or retained-custody leg.
localIssue.anchorRequired: Component {{component}} needs at least one imported transaction anchor.
localIssue.unresolvedValue: Component {{component}} still contains unresolved value; keep it as a draft until the gap is closed.
localIssue.quantityUnbalanced: Component {{component}} does not conserve {{exposure}} / {{unit}}: sources {{sources}}, sinks {{sinks}}.
localIssue.conversionReviewRequired: Component {{component}} needs a conversion policy and explicit conversion_reviewed=true.
localIssue.conversionValuationUnbalanced: Component {{component}} does not conserve valuation unit {{unit}}: sources {{sources}}, sinks {{sinks}}.
localIssue.conversionTopologyUnsupported: Component {{component}} must currently contain exactly one positive source and one owned destination in conversion mode.
localIssue.allocationsInvalid: Component {{component}} allocations must be a JSON array.
localIssue.allocationsRequired: Component {{component}} needs explicit allocations for this multi-leg flow.
localIssue.allocationObjectRequired: Component {{component}}, allocation {{allocation}} must be a JSON object.
localIssue.allocationSourceInvalid: Component {{component}}, allocation {{allocation}} has no valid source leg.
localIssue.allocationSinkInvalid: Component {{component}}, allocation {{allocation}} has no valid sink leg.
localIssue.allocationAmountInvalid: Component {{component}}, allocation {{allocation}} has an invalid exact-integer {{field}} (number or decimal string).
localIssue.allocationQuantityMismatch: Component {{component}}, allocation {{allocation}} does not conserve the same quantity and unit.
localIssue.allocationSourceCoverage: Component {{component}}, source leg {{leg}} has allocation coverage {{covered}}; expected {{expected}}.
localIssue.allocationSinkCoverage: Component {{component}}, sink leg {{leg}} has allocation coverage {{covered}}; expected {{expected}}.

backendIssue.active_lineage_conflict: More than one active revision exists in this lineage.
backendIssue.active_transaction_membership_conflict: A transaction already belongs to another active custody component.
backendIssue.allocation_leg_invalid: An allocation references a leg with the wrong role or a missing leg.
backendIssue.allocation_network_mismatch: A quantity allocation crosses incompatible Bitcoin network domains.
backendIssue.allocation_network_scope_invalid: A quantity allocation contains contradictory rail, chain, or network facts.
backendIssue.allocation_quantity_mismatch: An allocation does not conserve the same quantity and conservation unit.
backendIssue.allocation_required: This multi-leg component requires explicit allocations.
backendIssue.allocation_sink_coverage_mismatch: Allocation coverage does not equal a sink leg's full amount.
backendIssue.allocation_source_coverage_mismatch: Allocation coverage does not equal a source leg's full amount.
backendIssue.anchor_asset_mismatch: A leg's asset does not match its imported transaction anchor.
backendIssue.anchor_chain_mismatch: A leg's chain contradicts its imported transaction or wallet evidence.
backendIssue.anchor_coverage_mismatch: The component amount is not covered by its imported transaction anchor.
backendIssue.anchor_network_mismatch: A leg's network contradicts its imported transaction or wallet evidence.
backendIssue.anchor_occurred_at_mismatch: A leg's time does not match its imported transaction anchor.
backendIssue.anchor_rail_mismatch: A leg's Bitcoin rail contradicts its imported transaction or wallet evidence.
backendIssue.anchor_transaction_identity_mismatch: A leg points at inconsistent transaction anchors.
backendIssue.anchor_transaction_missing: An imported transaction anchor is missing.
backendIssue.anchor_transaction_excluded: An imported transaction anchor is excluded from journals.
backendIssue.anchor_transaction_retracted: An imported transaction anchor was retracted.
backendIssue.anchor_wallet_mismatch: A leg's wallet does not match its imported transaction anchor.
backendIssue.component_allocation_count_mismatch: The immutable revision contains a different number of allocations than its authored header committed to.
backendIssue.component_content_commitment_missing: This replicated revision is missing its immutable leg/allocation count commitment.
backendIssue.component_leg_count_mismatch: The immutable revision contains a different number of legs than its authored header committed to.
backendIssue.conversion_not_reviewed: The conversion has not been explicitly reviewed.
backendIssue.conversion_fee_quantity_mismatch: A conversion fee must equal the source quantity allocated to it.
backendIssue.conversion_fee_valuation_mismatch: A conversion fee's valuation does not match the proportional source value that journals will book.
backendIssue.conversion_policy_missing: The conversion needs an explicit policy.
backendIssue.conversion_topology_unsupported: A reviewed conversion currently needs exactly one source and one owned destination.
backendIssue.conversion_valuation_missing: Every material conversion leg needs an exact valuation.
backendIssue.custody_component_value_only_loss_unsupp: A fiat-only fee or external loss needs a positive quantity leg before journals can project it.
backendIssue.custody_component_fee_orphaned: A fee source needs an owned transfer or external disposal row to carry it into journals.
backendIssue.custody_location_continuity_mismatch: The authored custody locations do not form a continuous path.
backendIssue.destination_anchor_direction_mismatch: A destination leg is not anchored to an inbound transaction.
backendIssue.fee_source_asset_mismatch: A fee leg's asset does not match its source.
backendIssue.fee_source_scope_mismatch: A fee leg's Bitcoin rail or network does not match its source.
backendIssue.fee_source_wallet_mismatch: A fee leg's wallet does not match its source.
backendIssue.leg_occurred_at_invalid: A custody leg has an invalid RFC 3339 timestamp.
backendIssue.leg_occurred_at_missing: A transaction-less custody leg needs occurred_at.
backendIssue.loss_anchor_direction_mismatch: A loss leg is not anchored to an outbound transaction.
backendIssue.missing_owned_destination: The component needs a positive destination or retained-custody leg.
backendIssue.missing_source: The component needs a positive source leg.
backendIssue.owned_leg_wallet_missing: An owned custody leg needs a wallet.
backendIssue.revision_link_invalid: The revision link points outside this lineage or profile.
backendIssue.revision_link_missing: A linked custody-component revision is missing.
backendIssue.source_anchor_direction_mismatch: A source leg is not anchored to an outbound transaction.
backendIssue.transaction_anchor_missing: The component needs at least one imported transaction anchor.
backendIssue.transactionless_leg_wallet_missing: A transaction-less owned leg needs a wallet.
backendIssue.unbalanced_conversion_valuation: Source and sink conversion valuations do not balance by unit.
backendIssue.unbalanced_quantity: Source and sink quantities do not conserve by exposure and unit.
backendIssue.unresolved_value: The component still contains unresolved value.

backendError.custody_component_anchor_time_mismatch: A leg time conflicts with its imported transaction anchor.
backendError.custody_component_draft_exists: This lineage already has a draft. Edit or retire that draft first.
backendError.custody_component_incomplete: The component is incomplete or does not conserve.
backendError.custody_component_membership_conflict: A transaction already belongs to another active custody component.
backendError.custody_component_not_superseded: Only a superseded revision can be restored.
backendError.custody_component_scope_mismatch: The component does not belong to the active book.
backendError.custody_component_state_conflict: The component changed before this action completed. Reload and try again.
backendError.custody_component_superseded: A superseded revision cannot be activated directly. Restore it as a new draft first.
backendError.custody_component_validation: The daemon rejected a custody-component field.
backendError.conflict: The custody-component request conflicts with existing data.
backendError.not_found: The custody component, transaction, or wallet was not found in this book.
backendError.validation: The daemon rejected the custody-component request.

page.swapsDescription: Review likely non-Bitcoin asset swaps before pairing them as taxable swaps.
page.transfersDescription: Review wallet-to-wallet transfers and Bitcoin swaps across Lightning, Liquid, and on-chain rails.
page.swapsEmpty: No unpaired asset-swap candidates. If non-Bitcoin swaps show up later, they will appear here.
page.transfersEmpty: No unpaired Bitcoin movement candidates. Wallet transfers, Boltz swaps, pegs, and refunds show up here.

paired.label: Paired
paired.swapsDescription: Non-Bitcoin asset swaps you've already paired. Open one to change its kind or policy, or unpair it.
paired.transfersDescription: Wallet moves and Bitcoin swaps you've already paired with carrying-value treatment. Open one to change its kind or policy, or unpair it.
paired.swapsEmpty: No paired swaps yet. Swaps you confirm from the review queue show up here.
paired.transfersEmpty: No paired transfers yet. Transfers you confirm from the review queue show up here.
paired.sameAssetTaxableHint: Same-asset transfers stay carrying-value — taxable isn't available.
paired.unpairBody: The two legs go back to being unpaired and reappear in the review queue. Journal and tax deltas are recomputed on the next journal reprocess.

rules.title: Auto-pair rules
rules.empty: No auto-pair rules yet. Rules apply when a candidate matches the predicate and isn't part of a conflict cluster.

table.conflictTitle: One of these transactions appears in {{count}} possible matches. Open the row to pick the right one — pairing or dismissing resolves the others.
table.conflictHiddenTitle: {{count}} alternative match(es) are hidden by the current tab or filters.

preview.noPairsExact: No pairs were created. The candidates may already be paired, conflicted, or no longer match the current filters.
preview.noPairsSelected: No pairs were created. The selected candidates may already be paired or no longer match the current queue.
preview.pairFailed: Could not pair the selected candidates.

detail.rationalePaymentHash: Both legs share the same Lightning payment hash.
detail.rationaleProviderEvidence: Both legs share the same redacted provider swap id.
detail.rationaleHeuristic: The legs are close in time and amount after accounting for the fee delta.
detail.rationaleHtlcRefund: The inbound refund spends the outbound's on-chain HTLC funding output, a deterministic link even within one wallet.
detail.rationaleOwnershipGraph: The on-chain transaction proves a payment to another wallet you own. Confirming this card writes a normal carrying-value pair; it does not invent a receipt.
detail.conflictNote_one: One of these transactions also appears in {{count}} other possible match (it may be listed under the other tab or filtered out). Select the related same-asset privacy links together, or pair the correct single match here and dismiss the wrong ones.
detail.conflictNote_other: One of these transactions also appears in {{count}} other possible matches (it may be listed under the other tab or filtered out). Select the related same-asset privacy links together, or pair the correct single match here and dismiss the wrong ones.
detail.deltasNote: Journal and tax deltas are computed on the next journal reprocess.
detail.layerTransitionOwnershipHint: Pair a Bitcoin swap only when both legs are yours. If it paid someone else or received from someone else, leave it unpaired as a payment or receipt.

saveDialog.title: Save current filter as a view
saveDialog.description: The active confidence, method, and route filters are saved verbatim. Pick a short name; the chip appears at the top of the queue for one-click recall.

createRule.title: Create auto-pair rule
createRule.description: Candidates matching every non-default field will auto-pair with the chosen kind / policy. Conflict clusters never auto-pair.

keymap.title: Keyboard shortcuts
keymap.description: Shortcuts work whenever the focus isn't in a text field.

reconcile.placeholder:
Paste one address or transaction id per line, for example:
bc1qexampleaddress…
a1b2c3…  (64-char transaction id)
reconcile.title: Reconcile addresses & transactions
reconcile.description: Paste addresses or transaction ids to find which belong to a wallet in this book — receive or change — and which are external. Useful for telling apart historic payments from transfers between your own wallets.
reconcile.onDeviceNote: Checked on-device against your wallets — nothing leaves this machine. Transactions not in your synced history can be verified on chain below (that one step contacts your backend).
reconcile.fileEmpty: That file is empty — nothing to import.

activity.staleEdits_one: {{count}} edit after the last journal run
activity.staleEdits_other: {{count}} edits after the last journal run
activity.emptyLabel: No metadata activity matches these filters

revert.title: Edit reverted
revert.body: Kassiber wrote a new edit history entry with the reverted value.

details.notCapturedValue: Path, query values, request body, headers, credentials, descriptors, and AI prompts are discarded before the RAM buffer.

logs.ramNote: Local-only RAM buffer. Nothing is written to disk unless you export.

support.title: Export support bundle
support.description: Review the generated JSONL before saving.
support.highSignalDescription: Keeps addresses, paths, labels, URLs, and error text readable. Txids and amounts always become stable pseudonyms (amounts keep a coarse magnitude) — never the raw value.
support.publicSafeDescription: Masks operational fields after stripping wallet and credential material. Txids and amounts become stable pseudonyms with no magnitude.
support.notExportedBody: Add a short issue description first.

logs.exportRawConfirm: Export raw logs? They may contain sensitive local data.
logs.rawWarning: Raw logs are visible until {{time}}. Exports taken now are watermarked.

imports.title: Add connection
imports.description: Add watch-only wallet sources, node integrations, exchange imports, and local files.
imports.sourcesSubHeading: Choose the source type. Only watch-only or read-only flows belong here.
